name: Back Extension
form_cues: Hinge from the hips, neutral spine
Squeeze glutes at the top — don't hyperextend
Hold a plate to chest for added load once 15/15/15 feels easy
notes: Spinal erector + posterior chain. Pairs with cable rope crunch (anti-flexion balance).
video_id_query: Back Extension hyperextension bench how to proper form
instructions: Set the hyperextension bench pad just below your hip crease so you can hinge freely.
Anchor your heels under the foot pads. Hands behind head, crossed on chest, or holding a plate.
Brace core, hinge at the hips and lower your torso until you feel a stretch in the hamstrings.
Drive back up by squeezing glutes — stop at a straight line (don't hyperextend the lumbar spine).
